title: Sub Origins
description: These data packs add several extra options to the base origins, allowing you to swap out some powers for another.
body:
# Sub Origin

Hello, I'm here to give you an Origins data pack I've made!

This pack Reworks and adds Sub Origins! Adding a new layer allowing you to choose a variant of the origins iconic power! Allowing you to be a feline that can quickly Hide! Or a Avian who swims quickly but runs slower!

To see the full list of changes to the base origins see the Wiki.

It is split into 3 packs for ease of management, the T1 pack includes the AVIAN, FELINE, SHULK, and ARACHNID Origins; The T2 pack includes the ELYTRIAN, and ENDERIAN Origins; and the T3 pack includes the PHANTOM, MERLING, and BLAZEBORN Origins.

### -==T1 Sub Origins==-
SHULK
You may choose from four sub origins:
- Hoarder - Extra inventory
- City - Levitating attacks
- Tough - Can harder their defense
- Strong - Strong arms

AVIAN
You may choose from four sub origins:
- Common - Standard
- Aquatic - Extra water maneuverability
- Flare - Flame resistant
- Mature - Boost into the air

FELINE
You may choose from four sub origins:
- Pounce - Can leap forwards
- Hidden - Can quickly hide
- Climber - Can climb for a short amount of time
- Jumper - Can jump really high

ARACHNID
You may choose from four sub origins:
- Deep - Can see in the dark
- Jumper - Can jump off walls
- Webber - Can produce webs
- Venomous - Attacks are poisonous

### -==T2 Sub Origins==-

ENDERIAN
You may choose from four sub origins:
- Pearled - The common enderian
- Greater - Capable of precision teleportation
- Warped - Can become ethereal
- Shifter - Warps between dimensions

ELYTRIAN
You may choose from four sub origins:
- Gifted - Gifted the power of the winds
- Daredevil - Can use rockets, and craft them easily
- Oceanid - Infinite boosts when in water
- Sun-kissed - Bonuses when in the sun

### -==T3 Sub Origins==-

PHANTOM
You may choose from four sub origins:
- Ghost - Can phase through blocks
- Spirit- Floaty movement
- Shade - Fully invisible
- Wraith - Withering attacks

MERLING
You may choose from four sub origins:
- Deep Walker - Can walk on the ocean floor
- Semiaquatic - Can hold their breath for a long time
- Puffer - Thorny skin
- Common - Standard

BLAZEBORN
You may choose from four sub origins:
- True - Can levitate
- Tough - Hardened defences
- Swimmer - Speedy when in lava
- Common - Standard
